title: Supervise implementation of conservation earthworks plans
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Supervise implementation of conservation earthworks plans demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Plan efficient implementation of erosion and sediment control works

pcs.text: Review plans and specifications and correlate to earthworks work site
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Review plans and specifications and correlate to earthworks work site?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Review plans and specifications and correlate to earthworks work site.

pcs.text: Determine resource requirements to undertake work

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Plan and record work sequences according to proposed work schedule.

pcs.text: Order resources required for works according to construction schedule and workplace procedures

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Order resources required for works according to construction schedule and workplace procedures.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify potential regulatory, planning, biosecurity and environmental impacts of the work, and notify senior management of inconsistencies.

pcs.text: Identify workplace health and safety hazards, assess risks and implement control measures

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify workplace health and safety hazards, assess risks and implement control measures.
